name: linguaflow
description: LinguaFlow - Smart language learning platform for Vietnamese students
author: Nguyễn Sơn <jasonbmt06@gmail.com>

scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.typecheck: cd api && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../web && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.db:migrate: cd api && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:reset: cd api && npx prisma db push --force-reset && npm run db:seed
scripts.clean: rm -rf api/dist web/.next node_modules api/node_modules web/node_modules
